description_long: This object is a rectangular, multi-layered cake with alternating layers of golden-brown sponge and creamy white filling. The top surface is covered with a generous layer of coarse sugar crystals, giving it a textured, sparkling appearance. Each side reveals the distinct horizontal strata of cake and cream, suggesting a classic layered dessert such as a Napoleon or mille-feuille. The cake's edges are straight and clean, with no visible decorations or embellishments beyond the sugar topping. The overall look is simple and inviting, with a focus on the contrast between the soft cake and creamy layers. There are no visible candles, writing, or additional decorative elements.
description: A rectangular, multi-layered cake with golden sponge and white cream layers, topped with coarse sugar crystals. The design is simple and emphasizes the cake's layered structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the layered cake and cream structure with a textured sugar crystal topping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the even, horizontal layers and the sparkling sugar on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear display of the cake's uniform layers and sugar topping.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the same layered pattern and textured sugar surface as the front.
